summary: TheraGenie UX Improvements Testing - All 29 tests PASSED. App renamed from Haven to TheraGenie across all pages, sidebar reorganized with Clinical/Operations groups, personal greeting with time-based icons, actionable cards with CTAs, Today's Schedule with status badges, This Week section, Needs Attention alerts, and Coming Up section all working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All TheraGenie UX improvements verified. Branding updated across all dashboards (Login, Therapist, Client, Admin, Assistant). Sidebar reorganized with Clinical and Operations groups. Dashboard redesigned with actionable cards, time-based greeting, and calendar-centric layout.
